<var>
$DPS$ = Damage / Firerate
$CE$ = Total Price / DPS
$TP$ = $FNC-TOTALPRICE$
$FNC-COST$ = 750; 250; 750; 1900; 4500; 12500
$FNC-DETECTION$ = 2; ;
$FNC-UPGRADE$ = Improved Throwing; Double Head Axe; Blood Seeking; Tactical Ops; Head Chopping
$FNC-UPGRADEICON$ = 129697807; 542098553; 6426220009; 27386833; 143769378
$FNC-ROFBUG$ = Firerate
$FREF$ = <ref>The firerate assumes that the axe returns on time.</ref>
$DREF$ = <ref>DPS assumes that only one enemy is hit per throw.<br/>DPS also assumes that the axe returns on time.</ref>
</var>
<div class="overflow-box">
{| class="wikitable stats-table"
! Level !! Total Price !! Damage !! Firerate$FREF$ !! Tick !! Bounces !! Max Hits !! Range !! DPS$DREF$ !! Cost Efficiency
|-
| 0 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 5 || 3 || 0.15 || 3 || 3 || 14 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 1 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 5 || 2 || 0.15 || 3 || 3 || 14 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 2 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 10 || 2 || 0.15 || 3 || 3 || 14 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 3 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 18 || 2 || 0.15 || 4 || 3 || 18 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 4 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 35 || 2 || 0.15 || 4 || 3 || 18 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 5 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 80 || 2 || 0.15 || 7 || 3 || 18 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|}
</div>
